name: SpaceX IVA Suit
tagline: The white slim-fit Crew Dragon IVA suit, flown since Demo-2
description: SpaceX-designed launch-entry pressure suit. Single-piece front-entry, touchscreen-capable gloves to operate Crew Dragon's tablet console, custom-3D-printed helmets fitted to each crew member. Worn for ascent and re-entry on Crew Dragon. Distinctive minimalist white-and-black aesthetic.
best_known_for: The white slim-fit IVA suit worn on every Crew Dragon flight since Demo-2
